title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Senior Software Engineer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!
